A curated list of awesome Meteor Packages, libraries and software.

The official Meteor resources page can be found here

Getting Started

Where to start

  • Official Meteor tutorial
  • Official Guide

Collections

Helpers and expensions for collections

  • simple-schemastars526 - A JavaScript schema validation package that supports direct validation of MongoDB update modifier objects.
  • aldeed:collection2stars1k - Automatic validation of insert and update operations on the client and server.
  • dburles:collection-helpersstars504 – Transform your collections with helpers that you define.
  • matb33:collection-hooksstars643 - Extends Mongo.Collection with before/after hooks for insert/update/remove/find/findOne.
  • reywood:publish-compositestars548 - publish a set of related documents from various collections using a reactive join.
  • jagi:astronomystars609 - The Model layer for Meteor.
  • cultofcoders:grapherstars262 - Grapher: Meteor Collection Joins + Reactive GraphQL like queries.
  • sakulstra:aggregatestars36 - Add proper aggregation support for Meteor.
  • quave:collectionsstars16 - Create collections in a standard way.

REST

REST support for Meteor

  • maka:rest - automatically make your Meteor app accessible over HTTP and DDP alike.
  • vatfree:restivusstars0 - Make REST endpoints for your Meteor app with incredible ease.

Forms and Templates

Helpers for templates

  • uniformsstars1.4k - Bunch of React components and helpers to easily generate and validate forms. Seamlessly integrate with simpl-schema.
  • aldeed:autoformstars1.5k - UI components and helpers to easily create basic forms with automatic insert and update events, and automatic reactive validation.
  • ostrio:templatehelpersstars33 - Utility helpers for your Blaze templates.
  • aldeed:template-extensionstars220 - A Meteor package: Replace already defined templates, inherit helpers and events from other templates.
  • kadira:blaze-layoutstars1 - Layout Manager for Blaze (works well with Meteor FlowRouter)

Users and Authentication

Tools for handling users and authentication

  • accounts-jsstars1.3k - A suite of packages aims to provide all the tools you need to build a flexible authentication and accounts management solution for your application.
  • alanning:rolesstars922 - Roles support for the built-in accounts packages.
  • meteor-user-statusstars557 - Keeps track of users and their meta data.

Administration

Tools for administrating your Meteor apps

  • Meteor Candy - Fastest and easier way to add an admin panel to your app.
  • yogiben:adminstars839 - A complete admin dashboard solution.
  • houston:adminstars820 - A zero-config, Django Admin-like admin for Meteor.
  • zodern:pure-adminstars16 - An isolated, customizable admin panel for Meteor.

Monitoring

Tools for monitoring your Meteor apps

  • kschingiz:meteor-elastic-apmstars3 - Perfomance Monitoring for Meteor based on Elastic APM
  • monti-apm-agentstars34 - Performance Monitoring for Meteor
  • lmachens:kadirastars5 - Performance Monitoring for Meteor

Performance

Tools for speeding up your Meteor apps

  • cultofcoders:redis-oplogstars344 - Redis Oplog implementation to fully replace MongoDB Oplog in Meteor
  • staringatlights:fast-renderstars59 - An active fork of fast-render
  • epotek:method-cachestars10 - Meteor method caching using DataLoader
  • maestroqadev:pub-sub-litestars44 - Transform publications to be non-reactive.
  • artillery-engine-meteorstars4 - Artillery load testing for MeteorJS applications.

Deployment

Tools for deploying and maintaining Meteor apps

  • meteor-upstars1.3k – Meteor Deployments.
  • meteor-google-cloudstars32 - Automate Meteor deployments on Google Cloud App Engine Flexible
  • mup-aws-beanstalkstars121 - Deploy Meteor apps to AWS Elastic Beanstalk using Meteor Up
  • meteor-azurestars69 - Automate Meteor deployments on Azure App Service
  • pm2-meteorstars163 - Simplest way to deploy, scale and run Meteor Apps with PM2.
  • meteor-herostars38 - Deploy MeteorJS applications for free with one command utilizing Heroku's service.
  • meteor-kubernetes-guidestars34 - Deploy a Meteor app with Kubernetes.
  • meteorhacks:clusterstars1 - Clustering solution for Meteor with load balancing and service discovery
  • demeteorizerstars716 - Converts a Meteor app into a "standard" Node.js application
  • percolate:migrationsstars241 - Simple migration system for Meteor
  • yamupstars8 - Deploy Meteor apps to your own Ubuntu server (EC2, ...) without dockers

Docker Images

  • meteor-dockerstars32
  • meteor-basestars174
  • docker-meteorstars50

Routers

Routers for Blaze

  • ostrio:flow-router-extrastars183 - Carefully extended flow-router package. Up-to-date version with support of latest Meteor's releases.
  • msavin:parrotstars76 - Web router specially designed for building SPAs using Meteor
  • meteorhacks:pickerstars183 - Server Side Router for Meteor.
  • iron:routerstars2k - A router that works on the server and the browser, designed specifically for Meteor.

Offline

Tools for Meteor offline support

  • ground:dbstars572 - GroundDB is a thin layer providing Meteor offline database and methods.
  • npdev:collectionsstars16 - An easy way to create offline collections with SSR for Meteor
  • meteor-service-workerstars132 - Meteor specific service worker implementaion.
  • quave:pwastars3 - A Meteor package that allows you to configure your PWA.

Testing

Testing tools

  • meteortesting:mochastars65 - Mocha test driver package for Meteor.
  • lmieulet:meteor-coveragestars51 - Test coverage for Meteor.
  • hubroedu:mochastars3 - Decaffed cultofcoders:mocha fork.
  • antwaremx:meteormanstars39 - Meteorman: A DDP Client with GUI to test Meteor methods and publications (like Postman).

SEO

Search Engine Optimization tools

  • ostrio:spiderable-middlewarestars27 - Prerendering (a.k.a. Spiderable) with support of ES6 (ECMAScript2015) - Meteor app crawled perfectly by search engines.

Files

Handling files in Meteor

  • ostrio:filesstars1k - Upload files via DDP, HTTP and WebRTC/DC. To Meteor server FS, AWS, GridFS, DropBox or Google Drive. Fast, secure and robust.
  • @reactioncommerce/file-collectionsstars18 - Reaction FileCollections is a set of NPM packages that provide the ability to support file uploads, storage, and downloads in Node and Meteor apps, and in browser JavaScript.
  • netanelgilad:excelstars56 - Parsing and generating excel files (xlsx, xls).
  • mikkelking:slingshotstars6 - Upload files directly to AWS S3, Google Cloud Storage and others in meteor.

Search, sort and paginate

Search, sort and paginate related tools

  • percolate:find-from-publicationstars45 - Enable finding all documents that have been published by a given publication.
  • meteor-publish-joinstars19 - A performant NPM package for publishing non-reactive or aggregated values.
  • tmeasday:publish-countsstars200 - Publish the count of a cursor, in real time.
  • meteorhacks:search-sourcestars147 - Reactive Data Source for Search.
  • matteodem:easy-searchstars439 - Easy-to-use search with Blaze Components (+ Elastic Search Support)
  • alethes:pagesstars409 - Out of the box Meteor pagination.

Mobile

Mobile Development

  • meteor-pushstars22 - Push notifications for cordova (ios, android) browser (Chrome, Safari, Firefox).
  • quave:universal-linksstars0 - A Meteor package that allows you to expose your native iOS settings to enable Universal Links.
  • meteoric:ionicstars1.5k - Ionic components for Meteor.
  • driftyco:ionicstars44.1k - Official Ionic support for Meteor.
  • martijnwalraven:meteor-iosstars751 - Integrates native iOS apps with the Meteor platform through DDP.
  • delight-im/Android-DDPstars271 - DDP for clients on Android.
  • okland:accounts-phonestars115 - A login service based on mobile phone number for Meteor.
  • okland:camera-uistars28 - Meteor package for taking photos with user interface, one function call on desktop and mobile. Allows to choose between camera to photoLibrary on mobile.
  • percolatestudio/cordova-plugin-safe-reloadstars15 - Cordova plugin to watch and recover after a broken Meteor Hot Code Push.

Data Visualization

Data Visualization in Meteor: charts, maps, tables, etc.

  • aldeed:tabularstars362 - Reactive datatables for large or small datasets.
  • aslagle:reactive-tablestars333 - Reactive table for Meteor, using Blaze.
  • luixal:blaze-paginated-custom-liststars0 - Reactive and paginated item list.
  • luixal:meteor-apexchartsstars1 - Reactive ApexCharts library packaged for Meteor.

Analytics

Analytics

  • okgrow:analyticsstars212 - Google Analytics, Mixpanel, KISSmetrics (and more) integration for meteor.
  • quave:analyticsstars2 - A Meteor package that allows you to send your page views and more to Google Analytics.

Cron Jobs

Cron Jobs in Meteor

  • msavin:sjobsstars198 - A Meteor-first jobs queue / task scheduler.
  • percolate:synced-cronstars496 - Cron system for Meteor. It supports syncronizing jobs between multiple processes.
  • ostrio:cron-jobsstars17 - Package with similar API to native setTimeout and setInterval methods, but synced between all running Meteor (NodeJS) instances.

Debugging Tools

Debugging Tools

  • meteor-devtools-evolvedstars99 - A chrome extension.
  • msavin:mongolstars847 - Visual Editing Tool for Meteor for MongoDB Collections.
  • msavin:jetsetterstars184 - Visual Get/Set Tool for Meteor Session Variables.
  • babrahams:constellationstars33 - An extensible dev console for Meteor.

Editor Plugins

  • meteor-api - Meteor addons for Atom.
  • meteor-zsh - Completion for the meteor command.

Scaffolding

Scaffolding

  • Meteor Kitchen - Code generator for Meteor.
  • iron-clistars645 - A scaffolding command line tool for Meteor applications.
  • maka-clistars0 - Maka-CLI is a command line tool, which organizes a web application's file structure and automates everyday package installation tasks for various application frameworks.

Tooling

  • ESLint-plugin-Meteorstars118 - ESLint plugin for Meteor.

Boilerplate

  • Pupstars566
  • matteodem - meteor-boilerplatestars840
  • React with Webpack + Meteor as a backend

Open source apps

  • Rocket.Chat - Realtime chat application built with Meteor.
  • Wekanstars17.3k - Open source Trello-like kanban.
  • Unchained Shopstars104 - Open source Commerce platform developed with Meteor.
  • VulcanJSstars8k - A toolkit to quickly build apps with React, GraphQL & Meteor.
  • Crowducate Platformstars191 - Open source education platform Powered by Meteor.
  • Nosqlclientstars3.3k - MongoDB management tool.

Front End Frameworks

Alternative Front End Frameworks to Blaze

  • React - Working with React and Meteor.
  • Vuestars893 - Working with Vue and Meteor (plus single-file components & apollo support).
  • Sveltestars106 - Build cybernetically enhanced web apps with Meteor and Svelte.
  • Angular 2stars305 - Working with Angular 2 and Meteor.
  • Angularstars2.4k - Working with Angular and Meteor.
  • Famo.usstars337 - Famo.us and Meteor.
  • frozeman:build-clientstars265 - A tool to bundle the client part of a Meteor app.
  • Asteroidstars743 - An alternative client for a Meteor backend.
  • ddp.jsstars209 - Isomorphic JavaScript DDP client.
  • elmstars4 - elm as the view layer for a meteor based project.

Alternative Databases

Alternative Databases for MongoDB

  • vlasky:mysqlstars29 - Reactive MySQL for Meteor
  • meteor-pgstars23 - New and improved PostgreSQL support for Meteor
  • ostrio:neo4jdriverstars55 - Neo4j Driver for Meteor, with support of GrapheneDB
  • numtel:pgstars298 - Reactive PostgreSQL for Meteor
  • simple:rethinkstars307 - RethinkDB integration for Meteor

Resources

Where to discover new Meteor things

Books

  • Meteor Explained
  • Secure Meteor
  • meteor-tuts - Free
  • Meteor Tips - Free
  • Pro Meteor - Free
  • Meteor Cookbookstars1.7k

Courses

  • Free

    • How to Create an App - Most updated.
    • EventedMind - It's old but goes into detail regarding how Meteor internals.

  • Paid

    • Udemy - Learn React and Meteor in 2021: Build a multiplayer game
    • Udemy - Realtime Applications with Meteor and Vue - Course in Spanish.
    • leveluptutorials - Contains some free tutorials but mostly on 1.x.

Tutorials

  • Phusion Passenger: Meteor tutorial
  • When a Meteor finally hits production - Blog post about deploying Meteor apps
  • Transform any Meteor App into a PWA

Blogs

  • Official Meteor blog
  • The Meteor podcast

Websites

  • Official website
  • Official Documentation
  • Official Guide
  • Atmosphere - The catalog of Meteor packages, resources and tools.
  • Packosphere - Alternative front-end for Meteor package system, built by [Kelly Copley

](https://github.com/copleykj)

  • Discover Meteor
  • Meteorpedia (infrequently updated)
  • Meetups
  • Reddit
  • YouTube videos from meetups around the world
  • Unofficial Meteor FAQstars967
  • The Meteor Chef

Q&A

  • Stack Overflow
  • Meteor forums

Community Newsletters

  • zodern
  • StorytellerCZ

Social

  • Official Twitter Account
  • Meteor Community Organization Slack Channelstars41

Work Opportunities

  • Awesome Meteor Jobsstars5
  • We work Meteor
  • Official Job Board

Related

  • Awesome Meteor Developersstars8
  • Awesome Blazestars29

Built With Meteor

Commercial Grade Applications Built With Meteor

  • Qualia - Real Estate Startup
  • Code Signal - Skills-based assessment platform
  • Pathable - Events managment suite
  • MaestroQA - Quality assurance software

Deprecated

This section is desginated for resources which are no longer compatible with the current version of Meteor

  • Meteor 1.4 + React For Everyone Tutorials
  • Meteor 1.4 For Everyone
  • Intermediate Meteor
  • Meteor For Everyone Tutorials
  • tuts+ - Single Page Web Apps with Meteor
  • Building a CMS-powered blog in Meteor
  • scotch.io - Building a Slack Clone in Meteor

Contributing

Your contributions are always welcome!

Thank you @gillesfabio for creating this repo!
